name: ZhiHand
description: Pair a ZhiHand Android app, chat through OpenClaw, read the latest phone screen, and send BLE-backed control commands.

controlPlaneEndpoint.label: Control Plane Endpoint
controlPlaneEndpoint.help: Base URL for the ZhiHand control plane. Leave empty to use the official hosted endpoint.

originListener.label: Origin Listener
originListener.help: Advanced override for host origin metadata. Leave empty in normal hosted deployments.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.help: Human-friendly plugin name shown in pairing state.

stableIdentity.label: Stable Identity
stableIdentity.help: Advanced override for the stable host identity. Leave empty to auto-generate from hostname.

pairingTTLSeconds.label: Pairing TTL Seconds
pairingTTLSeconds.help: How long a generated pairing QR remains valid.

appDownloadURL.label: App Download URL
appDownloadURL.help: Optional app download URL shown in the pairing prompt. Leave empty for the official download page.

gatewayResponsesEndpoint.label: Gateway Responses Endpoint
gatewayResponsesEndpoint.help: Advanced override for the local OpenClaw /v1/responses endpoint.

gatewayAuthToken.label: Gateway Auth Token
gatewayAuthToken.help: Bearer token for the local OpenClaw gateway /v1/responses relay.

mobileAgentId.label: Mobile Agent Id
mobileAgentId.help: Dedicated OpenClaw agent id used for ZhiHand mobile prompts. Leave empty for zhihand-mobile.

requestedScopes.label: Requested Scopes
requestedScopes.help: Optional requested scopes included in the pairing descriptor. Leave empty for the recommended defaults.
